option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Compiled class file *.class
# Log file *.log
# BlueJ files *.ctxt
# Mobile Tools for Java (J2ME) .mtj.tmp/
# Package Files # *.jar *.war *.nar *.ear *.zip *.tar.gz *.rar
# virtual machine crash logs, see http://www.java.com/en/download/help/error_hotspot.xml hs_err_pid* replay_pid*
# Kotlin Gradle plugin data, see https://kotlinlang.org/docs/whatsnew20.html#new-directory-for-kotlin-data-in-gradle-projects .kotlin/

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Compiled class file *.class
# Log file *.log
# BlueJ files *.ctxt
# Mobile Tools for Java (J2ME) .mtj.tmp/
# Package Files # *.jar *.war *.nar *.ear *.zip *.tar.gz *.rar
# virtual machine crash logs, see http://www.java.com/en/download/help/error_hotspot.xml hs_err_pid* replay_pid*
# Kotlin Gradle plugin data, see https://kotlinlang.org/docs/whatsnew20.html#new-directory-for-kotlin-data-in-gradle-projects .kotlin/
# Local secrets .env

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Gestion_MobileK"> <!-- Ton MainActivity déjà là -->
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<!-- AJOUTE ÇA --> <activity android:name=".PersonListActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".AddPersonActivity" android:exported="false" /> <activity android:name=".ItemListActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".AddItemActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".PersonDetailActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".EditPersonActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".HistoriqueActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".RepasDetailActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".FutureRecettesActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".AddEditFutureRecetteActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".FutureRecetteDetailActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".AddHistoriqueRepasActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".PersonMealsHistoryActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".PersonGroupTasteActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".SettingsActivity" android:exported="false"/>
<receiver android:name=".FutureReminderReceiver" android:exported="false" />
<receiver android:name=".FutureReminderBootReceiver" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED" /> </intent-filter> </receiver>
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Gestion_MobileK"> <!-- Ton MainActivity déjà là -->
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<!-- AJOUTE ÇA --> <activity android:name=".PersonListActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".AddPersonActivity" android:exported="false" /> <activity android:name=".ItemListActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".AddItemActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".PersonDetailActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".EditPersonActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".HistoriqueActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".RepasDetailActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".FutureRecettesActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".AddEditFutureRecetteActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".FutureRecetteDetailActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".AddHistoriqueRepasActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".PersonMealsHistoryActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".PersonGroupTasteActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".SettingsActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".OnlineDiagnosticActivity" android:exported="false" />
<receiver android:name=".FutureReminderReceiver" android:exported="false" />
<receiver android:name=".FutureReminderBootReceiver" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED" /> </intent-filter> </receiver>
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F5F5F5" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Contenu principal --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="#4A90E2" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_title" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold"/>
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnMenu" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/home_menu" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@drawable/ic_more_vert" app:tint="@android:color/white"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Zone d'actions --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:paddingTop="32dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="18dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_access" android:textColor="#666666" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold"/>
<!-- Ligne du haut --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal" android:weightSum="2">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnIngredients" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/home_ingredients" android:textAllCaps="false" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="17sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/>
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFutureRecettes" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/home_future_recettes" android:textAllCaps="false" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="17sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Bouton central mis en avant --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPersonnes" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="170dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:elevation="6dp" android:text="@string/home_personnes" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Action secondaire large --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPlats" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:backgroundTint="#4A90E2" android:text="@string/home_plats" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- BottomSheet noir glissable --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/bottomSheet" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#1A1A1A" android:orientation="vertical" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:behavior_peekHeight="80dp" app:layout_behavior="com.google.android.material.bottomsheet.BottomSheetBehavior">
<!-- Trait blanc glissable --> <View android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:alpha="0.5" android:background="#FFFFFF"/>
<!-- Bouton Historique --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnHistorique" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/home_historique" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/>
<!-- Séparateur --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:background="#333333"/>
<!-- Label --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:text="@string/home_last_meals" android:textColor="#AAAAAA" android:textSize="13sp"/>
<!-- 3 derniers repas --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/containerLastMeals" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F5F5F5" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Contenu principal --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="#4A90E2" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_title" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold"/>
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnMenu" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/home_menu" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@drawable/ic_more_vert" app:tint="@android:color/white"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Zone d'actions --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:paddingTop="32dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="18dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_access" android:textColor="#666666" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold"/>
<!-- Ligne du haut --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal" android:weightSum="2">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnIngredients" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/home_ingredients" android:textAllCaps="false" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="17sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/>
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFutureRecettes" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/home_future_recettes" android:textAllCaps="false" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="17sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Bouton central mis en avant --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPersonnes" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="170dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:elevation="6dp" android:text="@string/home_personnes" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Action secondaire large --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPlats" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:backgroundTint="#4A90E2" android:text="@string/home_plats" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<Button android:id="@+id/btnConnectExternal" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/home_connect_external" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textStyle="bold" app:cornerRadius="24dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDataSourceStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/home_data_source_local" android:textColor="#666666" android:textSize="12sp" />
</LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- BottomSheet noir glissable --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/bottomSheet" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#1A1A1A" android:orientation="vertical" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:behavior_peekHeight="80dp" app:layout_behavior="com.google.android.material.bottomsheet.BottomSheetBehavior">
<!-- Trait blanc glissable --> <View android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:alpha="0.5" android:background="#FFFFFF"/>
<!-- Bouton Historique --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnHistorique" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/home_historique" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/>
<!-- Séparateur --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:background="#333333"/>
<!-- Label --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:text="@string/home_last_meals" android:textColor="#AAAAAA" android:textSize="13sp"/>
<!-- 3 derniers repas --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/containerLastMeals" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F5F5F5" tools:context=".OnlineDiagnosticActivity">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="#4A90E2" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/home_back" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel" app:tint="@android:color/white" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/online_diagnostic_title" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<View android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDiagnosticStatus" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="-" android:textColor="#444444" android:textStyle="bold" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRefreshDiagnostic" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/online_diagnostic_refresh" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" app:cornerRadius="24dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDiagnosticContent" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="16dp" android:textColor="#222222" android:textIsSelectable="true" android:typeface="monospace" tools:text="Diagnostic..." /> </ScrollView> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F5F5F5" tools:context=".SettingsActivity">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="#4A90E2" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/home_back" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel" app:tint="@android:color/white" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/settings_title" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<View android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp" android:paddingBottom="32dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_permissions_title" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvNotificationStatus" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:textColor="#444444" android:text="-" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAlarmStatus" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:textColor="#444444" android:text="-" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRequestNotifications" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_request_notifications" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnOpenAppSettings" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_open_app_settings" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnOpenAlarmSettings" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/settings_open_alarm_settings" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_preferences_title" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<CheckBox android:id="@+id/cbReminderNotifications" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_reminder_notifications" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnResyncReminders" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/settings_resync_reminders" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_about_title" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAbout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:textColor="#444444" android:text="-" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnLicense" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/settings_license" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F5F5F5" tools:context=".SettingsActivity">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="#4A90E2" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/home_back" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel" app:tint="@android:color/white" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/settings_title" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<View android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp" android:paddingBottom="32dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_permissions_title" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvNotificationStatus" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:textColor="#444444" android:text="-" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAlarmStatus" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:textColor="#444444" android:text="-" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRequestNotifications" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_request_notifications" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnOpenAppSettings" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_open_app_settings" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnOpenAlarmSettings" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/settings_open_alarm_settings" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_preferences_title" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<CheckBox android:id="@+id/cbReminderNotifications" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_reminder_notifications" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_data_source_title" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDataSourceStatus" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="-" android:textColor="#444444" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvRemoteDbName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="-" android:textColor="#444444" />
<CheckBox android:id="@+id/cbKeepExternalMode" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_keep_external_mode" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnOnlineDiagnostic" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:backgroundTint="#4A90E2" android:text="@string/settings_online_diagnostic" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" app:cornerRadius="24dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnResyncReminders" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/settings_resync_reminders" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/settings_about_title" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAbout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:textColor="#444444" android:text="-" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnLicense" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/settings_license" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">Gestion_MobileK</string> <string name="home_title">Last Meal Memory</string> <string name="home_menu">Menu</string> <string name="home_quick_access">Accès rapides</string> <string name="home_ingredients">Ingrédients</string> <string name="home_future_recettes">Future Recettes</string> <string name="home_personnes">Personnes</string> <string name="home_plats">Plats</string> <string name="home_historique">Historique</string> <string name="home_last_meals">Derniers repas</string> <string name="group_taste_likes_common">Aiment ensemble</string> <string name="group_taste_likes_all">Aiment tous</string> <string name="group_taste_dislikes_common">N’aiment pas ensemble</string> <string name="group_taste_dislikes_all">N’aiment pas tous</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_common_likes">Aucun goût commun</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_common_dislikes">Aucun rejet commun</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_all_likes">Aucun goût trouvé</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_all_dislikes">Aucun rejet trouvé</string> <string name="group_taste_filter_common">Afficher en commun</string> <string name="group_taste_filter_all">Afficher tout</string> <string name="group_taste_add_future_recipe">Ajouter à une future recette</string> <string name="home_back">Retour</string> <string name="group_taste_title">Goûts en commun</string> <string name="future_reminders_title">Rappels</string> <string name="future_reminders_enable">Se rappeler</string> <string name="future_reminders_add">+ Ajouter un rappel</string> <string name="future_reminders_empty">Aucun rappel ajouté</string> <string name="future_reminders_remove">Supprimer le rappel</string> <string name="future_reminders_help">Choisissez une date et une heure pour chaque rappel.</string> <string name="future_reminder_notification_title">Rappel de recette</string> <string name="future_reminder_ignore">Ignorer</string> <string name="future_reminder_snooze_1h">Rappeler dans 1h</string> <string name="menu_settings">Paramètres</string> <string name="menu_license">Licence</string> <string name="menu_about">À propos</string> <string name="settings_title">Paramètres</string> <string name="settings_permissions_title">Autorisations</string> <string name="settings_request_notifications">Demander l’autorisation de notifications</string> <string name="settings_open_app_settings">Ouvrir les paramètres de l’application</string> <string name="settings_open_alarm_settings">Ouvrir les rappels exacts</string> <string name="settings_notifications_not_required">Les notifications ne nécessitent pas de demande spéciale sur cette version.</string> <string name="settings_alarm_not_required">Les rappels exacts ne sont pas requis sur cette version.</string> <string name="settings_notification_status">Notifications : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_alarm_status">Rappels exacts : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_status_granted">autorisées</string> <string name="settings_status_missing">à activer</string> <string name="settings_preferences_title">Préférences</string> <string name="settings_reminder_notifications">Activer les notifications de rappels</string> <string name="settings_data_source_title">Source de données</string> <string name="settings_keep_external_mode">Rester en mode externe (connexion auto)</string> <string name="settings_data_source_status">Source active : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_data_source_local">base locale</string> <string name="settings_data_source_external">base externe</string> <string name="settings_remote_database">Base distante : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_remote_database_unknown">non connectée</string> <string name="settings_resync_reminders">Resynchroniser les rappels</string> <string name="settings_reminders_resynced">Rappels resynchronisés</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">Gestion_MobileK</string> <string name="home_title">Last Meal Memory</string> <string name="home_menu">Menu</string> <string name="home_quick_access">Accès rapides</string> <string name="home_ingredients">Ingrédients</string> <string name="home_future_recettes">Future Recettes</string> <string name="home_personnes">Personnes</string> <string name="home_plats">Plats</string> <string name="home_historique">Historique</string> <string name="home_last_meals">Derniers repas</string> <string name="home_connect_external">Se connecter</string> <string name="home_disconnect_external">Revenir en local</string> <string name="home_connecting">Connexion...</string> <string name="home_data_source_local">Source active : base locale</string> <string name="home_data_source_external">Source active : base externe (%1$s)</string> <string name="home_external_connected">Connecté à la base externe : %1$s</string> <string name="home_external_connection_failed">Connexion externe impossible : %1$s</string> <string name="home_returned_local">Retour à la base locale</string> <string name="home_returned_local_unsynced">synchronisation échoué</string> <string name="group_taste_likes_common">Aiment ensemble</string> <string name="group_taste_likes_all">Aiment tous</string> <string name="group_taste_dislikes_common">N’aiment pas ensemble</string> <string name="group_taste_dislikes_all">N’aiment pas tous</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_common_likes">Aucun goût commun</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_common_dislikes">Aucun rejet commun</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_all_likes">Aucun goût trouvé</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_all_dislikes">Aucun rejet trouvé</string> <string name="group_taste_filter_common">Afficher en commun</string> <string name="group_taste_filter_all">Afficher tout</string> <string name="group_taste_add_future_recipe">Ajouter à une future recette</string> <string name="home_back">Retour</string> <string name="group_taste_title">Goûts en commun</string> <string name="future_reminders_title">Rappels</string> <string name="future_reminders_enable">Se rappeler</string> <string name="future_reminders_add">+ Ajouter un rappel</string> <string name="future_reminders_empty">Aucun rappel ajouté</string> <string name="future_reminders_remove">Supprimer le rappel</string> <string name="future_reminders_help">Choisissez une date et une heure pour chaque rappel.</string> <string name="future_reminder_notification_title">Rappel de recette</string> <string name="future_reminder_ignore">Ignorer</string> <string name="future_reminder_snooze_1h">Rappeler dans 1h</string> <string name="menu_settings">Paramètres</string> <string name="menu_license">Licence</string> <string name="menu_about">À propos</string> <string name="settings_title">Paramètres</string> <string name="settings_permissions_title">Autorisations</string> <string name="settings_request_notifications">Demander l’autorisation de notifications</string> <string name="settings_open_app_settings">Ouvrir les paramètres de l’application</string> <string name="settings_open_alarm_settings">Ouvrir les rappels exacts</string> <string name="settings_notifications_not_required">Les notifications ne nécessitent pas de demande spéciale sur cette version.</string> <string name="settings_alarm_not_required">Les rappels exacts ne sont pas requis sur cette version.</string> <string name="settings_notification_status">Notifications : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_alarm_status">Rappels exacts : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_status_granted">autorisées</string> <string name="settings_status_missing">à activer</string> <string name="settings_preferences_title">Préférences</string> <string name="settings_reminder_notifications">Activer les notifications de rappels</string> <string name="settings_data_source_title">Source de données</string> <string name="settings_keep_external_mode">Rester en mode externe (connexion auto)</string> <string name="settings_data_source_status">Source active : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_data_source_local">base locale</string> <string name="settings_data_source_external">base externe</string> <string name="settings_remote_database">Base distante : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_remote_database_unknown">non connectée</string> <string name="settings_online_diagnostic">Diagnostic online</string> <string name="settings_resync_reminders">Resynchroniser les rappels</string> <string name="settings_reminders_resynced">Rappels resynchronisés</string> <string name="settings_about_title">À propos</string> <string name="settings_about_summary">Version %1$s (%2$d)</string> <string name="settings_about_dialog_text">Gestion_MobileK
Version %1$s (%2$d)

Application de gestion de personnes, goûts, historiques et rappels de recettes.</string> <string name="settings_license">Licence</string> <string name="settings_license_text">Projet personnel. Les bibliothèques AndroidX et Material utilisées par cette application restent soumises à leurs licences respectives. @SevanAndCO.</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_title">Diagnostic online</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_refresh">Rafraîchir</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_loading">Diagnostic en cours...</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_ready">Diagnostic prêt</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_error">Erreur de diagnostic</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_error_unknown">Impossible de lancer le diagnostic.</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_host">Hôte : %1$s:%2$d</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_database">Base résolue : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_configured_database">Base forcée : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_none">aucun</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_table_title">Table locale : %1$s | distante : %2$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_table_missing">introuvable</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_columns_local">Colonnes locales : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_columns_remote">Colonnes distantes : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_columns_mapped">Colonnes mappées : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_columns_ignored_local">Colonnes locales ignorées : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_columns_ignored_remote">Colonnes distantes ignorées : %1$s</string> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Gestion_MobileK</string> <string name="home_title">Last Meal Memory</string> <string name="home_menu">Menu</string> <string name="home_quick_access">Accès rapides</string> <string name="home_ingredients">Ingrédients</string> <string name="home_future_recettes">Future Recettes</string> <string name="home_personnes">Personnes</string> <string name="home_plats">Plats</string> <string name="home_historique">Historique</string> <string name="home_last_meals">Derniers repas</string> <string name="group_taste_likes_common">Aiment ensemble</string> <string name="group_taste_likes_all">Aiment tous</string> <string name="group_taste_dislikes_common">N’aiment pas ensemble</string> <string name="group_taste_dislikes_all">N’aiment pas tous</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_common_likes">Aucun goût commun</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_common_dislikes">Aucun rejet commun</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_all_likes">Aucun goût trouvé</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_all_dislikes">Aucun rejet trouvé</string> <string name="group_taste_filter_common">Afficher en commun</string> <string name="group_taste_filter_all">Afficher tout</string> <string name="group_taste_add_future_recipe">Ajouter à une future recette</string> <string name="home_back">Retour</string> <string name="group_taste_title">Goûts en commun</string> <string name="future_reminders_title">Rappels</string> <string name="future_reminders_enable">Se rappeler</string> <string name="future_reminders_add">+ Ajouter un rappel</string> <string name="future_reminders_empty">Aucun rappel ajouté</string> <string name="future_reminders_remove">Supprimer le rappel</string> <string name="future_reminders_help">Choisissez une date et une heure pour chaque rappel.</string> <string name="future_reminder_notification_title">Rappel de recette</string> <string name="future_reminder_ignore">Ignorer</string> <string name="future_reminder_snooze_1h">Rappeler dans 1h</string> <string name="menu_settings">Paramètres</string> <string name="menu_license">Licence</string> <string name="menu_about">À propos</string> <string name="settings_title">Paramètres</string> <string name="settings_permissions_title">Autorisations</string> <string name="settings_request_notifications">Demander l’autorisation de notifications</string> <string name="settings_open_app_settings">Ouvrir les paramètres de l’application</string> <string name="settings_open_alarm_settings">Ouvrir les rappels exacts</string> <string name="settings_notifications_not_required">Les notifications ne nécessitent pas de demande spéciale sur cette version.</string> <string name="settings_alarm_not_required">Les rappels exacts ne sont pas requis sur cette version.</string> <string name="settings_notification_status">Notifications : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_alarm_status">Rappels exacts : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_status_granted">autorisées</string> <string name="settings_status_missing">à activer</string> <string name="settings_preferences_title">Préférences</string> <string name="settings_reminder_notifications">Activer les notifications de rappels</string> <string name="settings_resync_reminders">Resynchroniser les rappels</string> <string name="settings_reminders_resynced">Rappels resynchronisés</string> <string name="settings_about_title">À propos</string> <string name="settings_about_summary">Version %1$s (%2$d)</string> <string name="settings_about_dialog_text">Gestion_MobileK
Version %1$s (%2$d)

Application de gestion de personnes, goûts, historiques et rappels de recettes.</string> <string name="settings_license">Licence</string> <string name="settings_license_text">Projet personnel. Les bibliothèques AndroidX et Material utilisées par cette application restent soumises à leurs licences respectives. Si tu veux une licence précise pour le projet, je peux te préparer un fichier LICENCE complet.</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Gestion_MobileK</string> <string name="home_title">Last Meal Memory</string> <string name="home_menu">Menu</string> <string name="home_quick_access">Accès rapides</string> <string name="home_ingredients">Ingrédients</string> <string name="home_future_recettes">Future Recettes</string> <string name="home_personnes">Personnes</string> <string name="home_plats">Plats</string> <string name="home_historique">Historique</string> <string name="home_last_meals">Derniers repas</string> <string name="home_connect_external">Se connecter</string> <string name="home_disconnect_external">Revenir en local</string> <string name="home_connecting">Connexion...</string> <string name="home_data_source_local">Source active : base locale</string> <string name="home_data_source_external">Source active : base externe (%1$s)</string> <string name="home_external_connected">Connecté à la base externe : %1$s</string> <string name="home_external_connection_failed">Connexion externe impossible : %1$s</string> <string name="home_returned_local">Retour à la base locale</string> <string name="home_returned_local_unsynced">synchronisation échoué</string> <string name="group_taste_likes_common">Aiment ensemble</string> <string name="group_taste_likes_all">Aiment tous</string> <string name="group_taste_dislikes_common">N’aiment pas ensemble</string> <string name="group_taste_dislikes_all">N’aiment pas tous</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_common_likes">Aucun goût commun</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_common_dislikes">Aucun rejet commun</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_all_likes">Aucun goût trouvé</string> <string name="group_taste_empty_all_dislikes">Aucun rejet trouvé</string> <string name="group_taste_filter_common">Afficher en commun</string> <string name="group_taste_filter_all">Afficher tout</string> <string name="group_taste_add_future_recipe">Ajouter à une future recette</string> <string name="home_back">Retour</string> <string name="group_taste_title">Goûts en commun</string> <string name="future_reminders_title">Rappels</string> <string name="future_reminders_enable">Se rappeler</string> <string name="future_reminders_add">+ Ajouter un rappel</string> <string name="future_reminders_empty">Aucun rappel ajouté</string> <string name="future_reminders_remove">Supprimer le rappel</string> <string name="future_reminders_help">Choisissez une date et une heure pour chaque rappel.</string> <string name="future_reminder_notification_title">Rappel de recette</string> <string name="future_reminder_ignore">Ignorer</string> <string name="future_reminder_snooze_1h">Rappeler dans 1h</string> <string name="menu_settings">Paramètres</string> <string name="menu_license">Licence</string> <string name="menu_about">À propos</string> <string name="settings_title">Paramètres</string> <string name="settings_permissions_title">Autorisations</string> <string name="settings_request_notifications">Demander l’autorisation de notifications</string> <string name="settings_open_app_settings">Ouvrir les paramètres de l’application</string> <string name="settings_open_alarm_settings">Ouvrir les rappels exacts</string> <string name="settings_notifications_not_required">Les notifications ne nécessitent pas de demande spéciale sur cette version.</string> <string name="settings_alarm_not_required">Les rappels exacts ne sont pas requis sur cette version.</string> <string name="settings_notification_status">Notifications : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_alarm_status">Rappels exacts : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_status_granted">autorisées</string> <string name="settings_status_missing">à activer</string> <string name="settings_preferences_title">Préférences</string> <string name="settings_reminder_notifications">Activer les notifications de rappels</string> <string name="settings_data_source_title">Source de données</string> <string name="settings_keep_external_mode">Rester en mode externe (connexion auto)</string> <string name="settings_data_source_status">Source active : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_data_source_local">base locale</string> <string name="settings_data_source_external">base externe</string> <string name="settings_remote_database">Base distante : %1$s</string> <string name="settings_remote_database_unknown">non connectée</string> <string name="settings_online_diagnostic">Diagnostic online</string> <string name="settings_resync_reminders">Resynchroniser les rappels</string> <string name="settings_reminders_resynced">Rappels resynchronisés</string> <string name="settings_about_title">À propos</string> <string name="settings_about_summary">Version %1$s (%2$d)</string> <string name="settings_about_dialog_text">Gestion_MobileK
Version %1$s (%2$d)

Application de gestion de personnes, goûts, historiques et rappels de recettes.</string> <string name="settings_license">Licence</string> <string name="settings_license_text">Projet personnel. Les bibliothèques AndroidX et Material utilisées par cette application restent soumises à leurs licences respectives. Si tu veux une licence précise pour le projet, je peux te préparer un fichier LICENCE complet.</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_title">Online diagnostic</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_refresh">Refresh</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_loading">Running diagnostics...</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_ready">Diagnostic ready</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_error">Diagnostic error</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_error_unknown">Unable to start diagnostics.</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_host">Host : %1$s:%2$d</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_database">Resolved database : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_configured_database">Forced database : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_none">none</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_table_title">Local table : %1$s | remote : %2$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_table_missing">missing</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_columns_local">Local columns : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_columns_remote">Remote columns : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_columns_mapped">Mapped columns : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_columns_ignored_local">Ignored local columns : %1$s</string> <string name="online_diagnostic_columns_ignored_remote">Ignored remote columns : %1$s</string> </resources>
